title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Account deletion flow in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings > General > Account shows Cancel returns to expanded Account tab and Confirm logs user out and removes from Cloud
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Log in to a Lens tenant account.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap the delete icon (trash/bin icon) next to the account.
5. Observe the confirmation dialog that appears.
6. Tap the Cancel button on the dialog.
7. Observe the result after tapping Cancel.
8. Repeat steps 1–4 to return to the confirmation dialog.
9. Tap the Confirm button on the dialog.
10. Observe the result after tapping Confirm.
expected: 1. After tapping Cancel: The dialog closes and the user is returned to Settings > General with the Account tab expanded. The user remains logged in and their account is still present on the Cloud. 2. After tapping Confirm: A spinner appears briefly, followed by an "Account Deleted" popup that appears briefly. The user is then moved back to Settings > General with the Account tab expanded. The user is logged out and their account is removed from the Cloud.
